backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing CRUD operations for Shows and DJs, including creating/assigning DJs to shows and a `getCurrentShow` query that determines the live show based on CST time.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, borders, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads `src/main.tsx` as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with public routes (Home, Shows, DJs) under a Layout and admin routes (Dashboard, ManageShows, ManageDJs) under an AdminLayout.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin panel shell with a responsive sidebar navigation (desktop and mobile), a top header bar with breadcrumb, and an Outlet for nested admin routes.
frontend/src/components/admin/DJFormModa: A dialog modal for creating a new DJ or viewing an existing DJ's details, with form fields for name, bio, and photo URL; editing existing DJs is not supported by the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/ShowFormMo: A dialog modal for creating a new radio show or editing an existing one's DJ assignment, with fields for title, description, schedule day/time, and DJ selection.
frontend/src/components/DJCard.tsx: Card component displaying a DJ's avatar, name, bio, and associated show tags with country-themed styling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, a live status indicator, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Public layout wrapper composing Navigation, a page Outlet, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, nav links, an admin link, and a pulsing 'On Air' indicator (with show title) shown on both desktop and mobile when a show is currently live.
frontend/src/components/OnAirNow.tsx: Displays a banner showing the currently on-air radio show with DJ name, schedule, and an animated 'On Air' badge, or a placeholder message if nothing is currently airing.
frontend/src/components/ShowCard.tsx: Renders a styled card for a single radio show displaying its title, description, schedule day/time, and associated DJ name.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating shows and DJs via the backend actor, including getAllShows, getAllDJs, currentShow, createShow, assignDjToShow, and createDJ.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for a warm country-themed light and dark color scheme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying stat cards for total shows, DJs, and assigned shows, plus a recent shows list with links to management pages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageDJs.tsx: Admin page for managing DJs, displaying them in a grid with avatar and bio, and supporting add/edit via a DJFormModal.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageShows.tsx: Admin page for managing radio shows, displaying a table of shows with edit actions and a modal form for creating or editing shows. Uses React Query hooks to fetch shows and DJs data, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/DJs.tsx: Public DJs page that fetches and displays all DJs in a responsive grid using DJCard components, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Public home page featuring a hero banner, live indicator, featured shows, and featured DJs sections with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Shows.tsx: Public shows page that fetches and displays all radio shows in a responsive grid using ShowCard components, with loading and empty states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, color tokens (amber, tan, burnt-orange, wood-dark, admin palette), border radius, box shadows, and accordion animations for the Country Channel site theme.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking version, feature inventory, architectural notes (CST timezone for scheduling), and known issues for The Country Channel radio station web app with public and admin sections.
